# Ready-made Combo Sets

A starter pack — **Melee**, **Mage**, **Range**, **Teleport scrolls**,
**Graceful**, **cosmetic weapons**, plus a low-alch glory combo.

**To import:** copy the whole block below (use the copy button in its
top-right corner), then in RuneLite open the **Combo Tags** side panel →
**Import from clipboard**. Everything loads at once — the `===` lines are
just labels the importer ignores.

```text
=== Melee (group, 11 combos) ===
combogroup:v1:

=== Mage (group, 12 combos) ===
combogroup:v1:

=== Range (group, 12 combos) ===
combogroup:v1:

=== TeleportScrolls (group, 3 combos) ===
combogroup:v1:

=== Graceful (group, 6 combos) ===
combogroup:v1:

=== CosmeticWeapons (group, 21 combos) ===
combogroup:v1:

=== GloryLow (combo) ===
combotag:v1:eyJuYW1lIjoiW0dsb3J5TG93XSIsIm1lbWJlcnMiOlsxNzA0XSwiY29sb3IiOi02NjE1MDY0LCJjYXRlZ29yeSI6IiIsInZhcmlhbnRPcmRlciI6eyIxNzA0IjpbMTcwNCwyMDU4NiwxNzA2LDE3MDgsMTcxMCwxNzEyLDExOTc2LDExOTc4LDEwMzYyLDEwMzYwLDEwMzU4LDEwMzU2LDEwMzU0LDExOTY2LDExOTY0LDgyODMsMTk3MDddfSwiaWNvbiI6MCwiaGlkZUhpZ2hsaWdodCI6ZmFsc2V9
```
